#  Payee User Guide 
Table of Contents 
##  What is a Subcontractor Invoice? 
A Subcontractor Invoice is a request for payment submitted by a business or individual who has entered into a binding agreement with another contracting party. In Procore, a subcontractor invoice is an equivalent term for a payable invoice.
[ ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payee-user-guide/review-and-accept-pay-agreements/)
[ Receive the Invite to Bill ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payee-user-guide/receive-the-invite-to-bill/)
